title: moraea citrina
intro: Moraea citrina, also known as the yellow sabella or yellow sabelline, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The medicinal properties of Moraea citrina include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Moraea citrina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Moraea citrina can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
